nasb.text: My soul is satisfied as with marrow and fatness, And my mouth offers praises with joyful lips.

esv.text: My soul will be satisfied as with fat and rich food, and my mouth will praise you with joyful lips,

cnv.text: 我的心滿足，就像飽享了骨髓肥油； 我要用歡樂的嘴唇讚美你。

ccb.text: 我心满意足，如享盛宴， 唱起欢快的歌赞美你。

csbs.text: 我的心就像饱尝了骨髓脂油， 我的口要以欢乐的嘴唇发出赞美。
